build_scope.source: Binance public data archive monthly USD-M futures klines

limitations: This is a data acquisition and panel build manifest only.
The panel is listing-aware/ragged; missing pre-listing archives are not synthesized.
No strategy execution, returns, candidate generation, edge claim, or runtime/live/capital permission is created.
Future strategy use requires a separate explicit contract and review.

incomplete_or_missing_interval_summary.missing_archive_policy: recorded as unavailable source months; no synthetic rows were created
